body_txt: This should be distinguished from situations where the character has to do some chore and is prevented from joining in the fun. Someone doing a Wall Glower could easily walk right in, but for one reason or another they don't want to. Presumably, they're hanging around only out of masochism. They usually storm off after a while anyway. It's "glower" as in "angry stare", pronounced to rhyme with "flower", by the way.
